overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic city during golden hour. The character moves from a palm-lined sidewalk past a large stadium, crosses a street, traverses a pedestrian overpass with neon lighting, and continues through an urban underpass beneath elevated highways with digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined pedestrian promenade with stadium view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a wide sidewalk lined with palm trees toward a large circular stadium structure

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the walkway
large circular megastructure with metallic exterior in the distance
skyscraper with illuminated 04 signage near the top
large cylindrical industrial containers with red piping

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide, sunlit sidewalk lined with palm trees. The camera moves forward toward a massive circular stadium structure in the distance, with a tall skyscraper marked 04 visible to the right. Industrial tanks sit on the left side as the character walks along the concrete promenade.

events.description: crossing the street at a marked pedestrian crosswalk
approaching the entrance to a covered pedestrian overpass

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and approaching a pedestrian overpass structure with stairs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange and blue outfit crossing the street in front of the camera

entered.detail: futuristic pedestrian bridge with angular supports and stair access
marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at an intersection, passing a pedestrian in an orange outfit. The view opens toward a pedestrian overpass structure ahead, while the circular stadium and tall tower remain visible in the background. The sidewalk transitions to asphalt crosswalk markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian overpass with neon-lit stairwells

events.description: entering covered stairwell, lighting shifts from natural sunlight to artificial neon tubes
exiting the overpass back into natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs up to the overpass, crossing the enclosed bridge, and descending stairs on the opposite side

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the overpass stairs moving in the same direction

entered.detail: enclosed concrete stairwell with angular architecture
green fluorescent tube lights mounted along the stairwell walls
elevated walkway with glass panels overlooking the highway below

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered stairwell illuminated by green neon tube lights, ascending to an elevated pedestrian bridge. Through the glass panels, highway traffic is visible below. After crossing the bridge, the character descends the stairs on the opposite side, transitioning from artificial lighting back to natural sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway underpass with digital advertising

events.description: emerging from overpass into shaded urban canyon beneath stacked elevated highways

agents.ego_description: walking along a sidewalk beneath multiple layers of elevated highways and overpasses

entered.detail: multi-tier concrete highway structure with support pillars overhead
large illuminated advertising screens mounted under the overpass showing colorful graphics
orange and white striped construction barriers along the right side

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the scene transitions to an urban canyon beneath stacked highway overpasses. Digital billboards illuminate the shaded area with colorful advertisements. The tall tower with 04 signage remains visible ahead as the character walks along the sidewalk, passing parked cars and construction barriers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sun-drenched coastal promenade into the shaded, neon-lit depths of a futuristic urban canyon. It begins on a wide sidewalk lined with palm trees and industrial tanks, moving steadily toward a massive circular stadium and a distant skyscraper marked 04. As the camera crosses an asphalt intersection past a pedestrian in orange, the open vista shifts toward a pedestrian overpass. The scene then transitions into a covered stairwell illuminated by green neon tubes, ascending across a glass-paneled bridge over highway traffic before descending back into the natural golden light. Finally, the camera enters a shaded underpass beneath stacked highways, where colorful digital billboards illuminate the path past parked cars and construction barriers toward the looming tower.
